fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
internal: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
notFound: The requested resource was not found.
forbidden: You do not have access to this action.
emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
invalidToken: The link or code is invalid.
tokenExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
recoveryNotAvailable: No eligible recovery method is configured for this account.
authProviderNotConfigured: This sign-in method is temporarily unavailable.
authProviderFailed: Could not sign in with the external service.
mailSendFailed: Could not send the email. Please try again later.
invalidTwoFactorCode: The two-factor authentication code is invalid.
rateLimited: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
backendUnreachable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
payloadTooLarge: The submitted data is too large.
sendRecovery: Could not send the recovery request.
